summary: This document summarizes user interviews with Primary Care Relatives, Seniors, and Health Care Professionals regarding elderly care challenges and needs. It highlights key pain points such as trust issues, family coordination gaps, and safety concerns, alongside potential feature ideas like automated check-in notifications. The notes provide qualitative insights into user behaviors and preferences relevant to developing care support technology.
